elo.title: ELO Rating
elo.inactiveTip: Inactivity calibration: −{{pts}} ELO for ~{{weeks}} weeks without importing tournaments. Import a tournament to recover.

page.title: ELO Rating
page.description: ELO-based rating adapted for poker. Each decision is a 'match' against the GTO solver.

leaderboard.title: Student Leaderboard
leaderboard.description: Ranked by LEARNING: GTO adherence, evolution, engagement and volume. Not by money.
leaderboard.empty: Nobody eligible yet in this period. Keep importing tournaments and training.
leaderboard.gateNote: To qualify: min. {{hands}} hands, {{tournaments}} tournaments and {{gto}} solver decisions.
leaderboard.coachRankingHint: Among your students, by learning. You always see the real numbers.
leaderboard.coachRankingNoneEligible: No student eligible yet in this period.
leaderboard.hofSubtitle: The #1 of the GTO Adherence ranking each month.
leaderboard.optInHint: On: you show up in the ranking for other students. Off: only you see your position.
leaderboard.handleHint: How you appear in the ranking. Empty = your username.
leaderboard.handleTaken: That handle is already taken. Pick another.
leaderboard.coachNote: Your coach always sees your numbers, regardless of this setting.
leaderboard.notListed: You're not on the public leaderboard
leaderboard.notListedCta: Turn on participation below to appear.
leaderboard.skillSubtitle: Ranked by skill: GTO adherence over time.

title: Dashboard
subtitle: Monitor performance, review leaks, and track your technical evolution tournament by tournament.

kpis.roiTooltip: Cumulative return on investment. Positive ROI means you're profiting above the average buy-in. Reference: consistent regular players sit between +20% and +80% in MTTs.
kpis.itmTooltip: Percentage of tournaments where you finished in the money. Field average is ~18%. Above 22% suggests solid or conservative play; below may indicate early bust-outs.
kpis.standardTooltip: Percentage of decisions aligned with the GTO solver (correct + mixed) over the last 90 days. Calculated by comparing your plays against static ranges and solver data. Only decisions with available GTO coverage are counted.
kpis.eventsTooltip: Total volume of analyzed tournaments. Samples smaller than 30 tournaments may have financial results skewed by variance. Decision analysis is reliable from ~500 hands.

linkCoach.message: Have a coach? Link your profile to share your history.

aiConfidence.title: AI Confidence
aiConfidence.tooltip: Indicates the reliability of analyses based on data volume. The more tournaments imported, the more accurate the leak recommendations and study plan.
aiConfidence.summary: {{count}} tournaments analyzed. Sufficient volume to suggest reliable adjustments.
aiConfidence.empty: Import tournaments to activate AI confidence analysis.

leaks.tooltip: A training plan for your leaks: Ghost Table drill progress, trend, and a study shortcut for each, ordered by EV impact. The diagnosis of where you lose EV is in the Leak Finder.
leaks.title: Training Queue
leaks.sourceGtoTooltip: Leaks computed from decisions with GTO coverage (solver + ranges). Higher precision.
leaks.sourceHeuristicTooltip: Not enough GTO coverage. Leaks computed by the engine's heuristic analysis, may be less precise.

ghost.tooltip: Summary of your drill activity in the last 30 days. Overdue drills (red) indicate spots that need review, skipping them increases the chance of repeating the same mistake in live play.
ghost.title: Ghost Table
ghost.noActivity: No drills in the last 30 days.

bankroll.tooltip: Cumulative financial result curve tournament by tournament. Shows real variance and long-term trend, not just isolated results. Useful for deciding stake adjustments.
bankroll.title: Bankroll evolution
bankroll.demo: Demo • import tournaments to see your data
bankroll.emptyPeriod: Not enough tournaments in this range. Try a longer period.

table.title: Recent tournaments
table.gtoPendingTooltip: GTO sync hasn't completed for this tournament yet. KPIs may change once analysis finishes.
table.gtoCoverageTooltip: Percentage of this tournament's decisions with GTO analysis available. The rest use heuristic classification.
table.qualityTooltip: Session quality: % of decisions on standard (no mistake), by the GTO/heuristic verdict.
table.gtoSplitTooltip: GTO coverage. Preflop uses the GTO Wizard ranges (near-instant). Postflop is solved on demand on the server, coverage grows as you review your hands.

decisions.title: Decision Quality
decisions.tooltip: Distribution of all your decisions by quality. Standard = within expected range (score ≤ 0.08). Marginal = acceptable but suboptimal. Mistakes reduce your long-term ROI.

streets.title: Performance by Street
streets.tooltip: Standard decision rate (score ≤ 0.08) per street. Streets in orange or red indicate where your leaks are concentrated.

positions.title: Performance by Position
positions.tooltip: Standard decision rate by table position. BTN and CO usually have positional advantage. Defensive BB and SB are where most players lose the most equity.

gtoPosition.title: GTO Alignment by Position
gtoPosition.tooltip: GTO alignment breakdown by position, identifies which seat has the most solver divergence over the last 90 days.

gtoNotice.needMoreData: Import more tournaments to activate this analysis. At least 10 decisions with GTO coverage are required.
gtoNotice.processing: {{n}} spot being processed by the GTO solver, this card will update when analysis completes.
gtoNotice.processing_plural: {{n}} spots being processed by the GTO solver, this card will update when analysis completes.
gtoNotice.bannerDesc: {{n}} spot is still being validated by the solver. Your stats will be recomputed automatically when it finishes.
gtoNotice.bannerDesc_plural: {{n}} spots are still being validated by the solver. Your stats will be recomputed automatically as they finish.

form.title: Recent Form
form.tooltip: Average decision quality in recent tournaments. Green = standard session, yellow = marginal, orange/red = session with significant errors.

icm.title: ICM Pressure
icm.tooltip: ICM (Independent Chip Model) measures the monetary value of chips in MTTs. Under high pressure (bubble, FT), mistakes cost much more than the nominal chip value.

pressure.title: Pressure Collapse
pressure.tooltip: Compares your decision quality across ICM pressure levels. A solid player maintains consistent scores regardless of pressure. A delta above 8pts indicates collapse.
pressure.collapseSummary: Score +{{delta}}pts worse under high ICM pressure, focus on bubble and FT spots.
pressure.stableSummary: Stable performance: only {{delta}}pts variation between high pressure and no pressure.

drift.alertDesc: {{n}} recent sessions with technical quality below your baseline, possible tilt or fatigue.

pendingGto.notice: {{n}} GTO spot being analyzed by the solver. Your stats recompute on their own as it validates, {{eta}}.
pendingGto.notice_plural: {{n}} GTO spots being analyzed by the solver. Your stats recompute on their own as it validates, {{eta}}.

gtoQuality.title: GTO Alignment
gtoQuality.tooltip: Distribution of decision quality evaluated by the GTO solver over the last 90 days. Only decisions with available GTO data are counted.

leakFinder.title: Leak Finder
leakFinder.tooltip: Your leaks prioritized by EV LOST (big blinds left on the table), not by error count. The top is where the most EV escapes, start there.
leakFinder.headline_label: left on the table across {{n}} leaked spots
leakFinder.coaching: Attack top-down: fixing leak #1 is worth more than several small ones. Each row is a recurring spot, review it in the Replayer and train it on the Ghost Table.

resultsVsGto.title: Results × GTO
resultsVsGto.tooltip: Decisions that were CLEAR GTO mistakes but the hand was won, the result masks the process error. Winning doesn't validate the play.
resultsVsGto.headline_label: clear GTO mistakes in hands you won
resultsVsGto.stat_won_were_critical: of decisions in won hands were clear mistakes
resultsVsGto.stat_critical_hidden: of your clear mistakes were hidden behind wins
resultsVsGto.coaching: The result masks the process: winning doesn't mean you played it right. Review these spots even when you win.

gtoAlignment.title: GTO Alignment by Street
gtoAlignment.tooltip: GTO alignment breakdown by preflop, flop, turn, and river, identifies which phase of the game has the most solver divergence.

level.tooltip: Your current level based on your average Standard% across recent tournaments. Each level requires a higher threshold of correct decisions, advancing means your mistakes have consistently decreased.
level.title: My Level
level.noData: Import at least 5 tournaments to calculate your level.

playerStats.noData: Import tournaments to calculate your playing profile.

dna.title: Strategic Profile
dna.tooltip: Strategic signature based on your real decision patterns. Each axis represents a dimension of your playing style.
dna.noData: Import tournaments to calculate your strategic profile.

archetypeDesc.TAG: Selective and aggressive when entering, winning profile in regular MTTs.
archetypeDesc.LAG: Plays many pots and applies pressure, effective, but requires range calibration.
archetypeDesc.Nit: Folds too much: loses passive equity and gets exploited by regulars.
archetypeDesc.Calling Station: Calls too much: makes it easy for opponents to extract EV.
archetypeDesc.Balanced: Well-rounded profile: good range control across multiple positions.

empty.title: Initialize your tactical base
empty.loadingDesc: The HUD will be populated once the scan is complete.
empty.desc: Upload your hand history file (.txt from PokerStars or GGPoker) to calibrate the HUD and expose your table leaks.
empty.m1desc: Automatic identification of sub-optimal patterns in your game tree, with severity and EV loss calculated hand by hand.
empty.m2desc: Variance tracking and bankroll evolution chart tournament by tournament, for stake decisions with confidence.
empty.m3desc: Conversational AI analysis with your real data: ranges, ICM, leaks and personalized study plan.

leakCausalMap.tooltip: Visualizes which leaks co-occur in the same tournaments (across different hands). Thicker lines indicate stronger correlation, when two leaks appear together in the same tournament, they usually share a common root cause.
leakCausalMap.title: Leak Causal Map

career.tooltip: Projects when you will reach each level based on your real improvement curve. The dotted line is an estimate, not a guarantee. The main value is seeing which leak is blocking your next level.
career.title: Career Trajectory
career.noData: Import at least 5 tournaments to generate your career projection.

cognitiveFailure.tooltip: Detects emotional patterns that affect sequential decision quality, for example, becoming overly aggressive right after folding several hands in a row. Identifying the trigger is the first step to correcting it.
cognitiveFailure.title: Cognitive Patterns
cognitiveFailure.noData: Insufficient data. Import more tournaments to detect cognitive patterns.
cognitiveFailure.noPatterns: No cognitive patterns detected. Your game is cognitively consistent.

descriptions.revenge_aggression: Aggressive mistakes shortly after a sequence of correct folds
descriptions.fear_folding: Incorrect folds after consecutive aggressive mistakes (blowup hands)
descriptions.sunk_cost: Bad calls across multiple streets of the same hand (chasing the pot)
descriptions.entitlement_tilt: Cascading mistakes after a long streak of correct decisions
descriptions.compensation_call: Incorrect calls in the hands following a correct fold of a strong hand
descriptions.icm_blindness: Risking your stack on thin final-table spots where ICM calls for tightening (survival has value)

strategicTwin.title: Strategic Patterns
strategicTwin.tooltip: Identifies spots (street + action + ICM pressure combinations) where your error rate exceeds your personal average by at least 10%. Reveals costly habits invisible when looking at individual decisions.
strategicTwin.noData: Import more tournaments to build your strategic profile. Minimum: 30 analysed decisions.
strategicTwin.noPatterns: No costly spots detected. Keep playing to refine your analysis.

v2.toggleTip: Switches between the classic dashboard and the new one (EV in bb as the lead metric). Preference saved in this browser.
v2.evNoData: No EV data yet, import hands and wait for solver analysis.
v2.ctaNoLeak: No leak with measured cost yet.
v2.covNote: Postflop grows on its own: the solver queue resolves spots as you review hands.
v2.aiLocked: AI insights (Strategic Twin, cognitive patterns, career projection) are a Pro feature. Upgrade to unlock them.
v2.posHint: aligned% by position: green ≥70, amber ≥50, red below
v2.causalEpicenterDesc: connected to {{n}} other leaks, fixing this one breaks the chain
v2.causalNoEdges: Your leaks still show up isolated, they don't repeat together in the same tournaments. The causal map appears once the same mistakes happen in the same tournament. For now, your attention points:
v2.causalConclusion: What this means: your mistakes don't happen in isolation, "{{a}}" and "{{b}}" showed up in the same hands {{n}} times, a sign one triggers the other. The highest-leverage point is "{{epi}}": it's linked to {{deg}} other leaks, and fixing it tends to bring the whole chain down.

coachReferral.referredHint: Who joined through your link. Commission depends on them paying and in good standing.
coachReferral.summary: {{paying}} paying in good standing of {{total}} referred
coachReferral.empty: No referred students yet. Share your link below to get started.
coachReferral.countsTitle: Referred, paying and in good standing, counts toward your commission
coachReferral.notCountsTitle: Does not count toward commission yet
coachReferral.linkExplain: When someone signs up through this link they are linked to you automatically and show up in your approval queue as pending.
